news.t: Defiance Launches PLU: The First 2X Long ETF for Planet Labs PBC

holdings.infoBox: PLU is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 70.76%, PLANET LABS PBC-SWAP-JNST-L at 39.96%, PLANET LABS PBC SWAP CANTOR-L at 38.56%, PLANET LABS PBC SWAP CS-L at 35.85%, and PLANET LABS PBC SWAP MAREX-L at 35.52%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Long PL ETF (PLU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. PLU was launched on Jan 6, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.
